title: Nit Pack
description: A Vanilla like, only client side modifications to make Minecraft just a bit better
body:
# **Nit** **Nit Pack** is mostly used by Me and my friends for my server but it can be used on almost every server becouse it has only client-side changes ## Features - 🚀 Performance improvments - 🔳 GUI Overhaul - 🪄 Many more small animations and particles were added - 🍉 3D Crops, ☀️ Sun/Moon, Lanterns - 🌅 Shaders - Complementary Unbound - 📎 Easy Sorting - ✨️ Sound Overhaul - 🗣 Simple Voice Chat (on Server the support it) - ✔️ Better Statistics ![A foto that represents almoust every aspect of the modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d05bbf4f775e01ac8454f08a658d4a7eeb887d7.jpeg)
